name: io.github.sethbang/proton-mail-mcp
title: Proton Mail (unofficial)
description: Unofficial Proton Mail MCP — send, read, search & organize email over SMTP and IMAP

environmentVariables.name: PROTONMAIL_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Your Proton Mail SMTP password (not your login password; generate one in Proton settings)

environmentVariables.name: PROTONMAIL_SECURE
environmentVariables.description: Use TLS for SMTP (true for port 465)

environmentVariables.name: IMAP_HOST
environmentVariables.description: Proton Mail Bridge IMAP host (required for read/search tools)

environmentVariables.name: IMAP_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: Proton Mail Bridge username (falls back to PROTONMAIL_USERNAME)

environmentVariables.name: IMAP_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Proton Mail Bridge password (falls back to PROTONMAIL_PASSWORD)

environmentVariables.name: READONLY
environmentVariables.description: Disable all mutating tools (send, move, delete, flags, labels, bulk ops, folder/label management)

environmentVariables.name: RESTRICT_OUTBOUND_TO_SELF
environmentVariables.description: Refuse live sends to any recipient other than PROTONMAIL_USERNAME (for throwaway/QA accounts)

environmentVariables.name: ALLOW_FILE_DOWNLOAD_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Allowlist directory enabling download_attachment.saveTo; when unset, attachments return as inline base64
